name: @agent-index/filesystem-s3

scripts.build:bundle: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.bundle.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"

author: Agent Index
